title: Coal Indias Production Remains Strong But Electricity Generation Continuing To Set New Records
section_path: Coal Indias Production Remains Strong But Electricity Generation Continuing To Set New Records
section_path_text: Coal Indias Production Remains Strong But Electricity Generation Continuing To Set New Records
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Coal India produced approximately 53.5 million tons of coal last month, which marks a month-on-month decline of 26.6 million tons (-33%) but a year-on-year increase of 11.6 million tons (28%). The month-on-month decline is very normal. Much more significant is that production last month grew year-on-year by 27%.
